untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of: (1) an upwards breakout event, (2) a flag pattern formation with specific geometric properties (parallel lines, congestion area), and (3) directional lean of the flag relative to the trend. These require pattern recognition logic beyond simple indicator comparisons. Breakout detection, flag geometry, and flag-lean direction are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used close > sma_20 for uptrend confirmation and adx_14 > 25 for trend strength as a partial substitute for breakout + flag pattern detection. Exit on trend break (close < sma_20). However, this loses the critical 'first flag after breakout' and 'downward lean confirmation' logic that defines this pattern-based signal. Full implementation requires custom pattern recognition.
